name: Green Creek Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Green Creek Community Center in Tryon, NC! There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is private.

name: Polk Co. Rec.
description: Polk Co. Rec. is a place to play pickleball in Columbus, NC. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is free.
